title: Straw Hats Hold the Line
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kid, Tama, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You can only wish for luck,

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: gyAah!! The Dino-Man is clinging onto KOMachiyo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: How many shots can this guy take!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: His resilience is out of this world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right back at you! Why don't you give up?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Horsella's feeding my Dango to lots of bad guys,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I should be able to take charge of them all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...Once we reach the live floor's stage!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's my job to turn them into Allies! It doesn't matter what happens to me after that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we can't stop till I've done that. Please...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your big SIS and Uncle Will Protect You!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How am I an Uncle?! I'm only 19!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry for making you worry, Tama!! I'll take care of it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My bad! My weapons aren't meant for close combat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How do you like them apples?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 50 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
